bridge_equation_v44.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v44 = mix(B_plastic_v43, L_sys_field_mesh, 1 - P_sys_field_mesh, D_feature_v38, 1 - G_brain_v38)
bridge_equation_v44.structure_term: B_struct_v44 = mix(B_struct_v43, S_sys_field_mesh, R_sys_field_mesh, 1 - P_sys_field_mesh, D_structure_v38)
bridge_equation_v44.readiness_term: R_train_v44 = mix(R_train_v43, B_plastic_v44, B_struct_v44, R_sys_field_mesh, D_align_v38, 1 - P_sys_field_mesh)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v44 checks whether systemic low-risk field mesh begins to reduce rule-layer risk in a more resilient mesh-like way.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this mesh-like low-risk field still survives after it is folded into the next closed-form core.
